body.title: uu <verb> dispatcher — zero-inference view/control CLI
body.intention: I intend that Akien can see what CC sees (tickets, feeds, health, inbox) by running a shell command with zero inference calls.
body.description:
**Problem:** ~14 read-only 'skills' cost an inference call to view state — you spin up CC just to look at your own queue. Build a single `uu <verb>` shell dispatcher that routes to the existing scripts, zero-inference; CC shells out to the same dispatcher when it needs the data. (`uu` confirmed free on this box — no binary/alias/PATH collision; only the legacy UUCP uu* family shares the prefix.)

**Shape:** `uu <verb> [args]` dispatcher (thin bash or python) on PATH; routes verbs -> existing scripts under devlab/claudecode (cc_queue.py, stall_check.py, cc_inbox.py, channel.py, uurecall/uuresearch impls). Absorbs the four existing uu* commands (uumytickets, uuopentickets, uurecall, uuresearch). `uu` with no verb -> help listing verbs; unknown verb -> help + nonzero. Wired via bin/uu_bash_profile_processor.sh (the config-identity layer is the natural setup home; resolves UU_ROOT).

**Affected files:** new bin/uu (dispatcher); bin/uu_bash_profile_processor.sh (put bin/ on PATH); devlab/claudecode/*.py (routing targets, unchanged); ~/.bashrc (retire the 4 uu* aliases into the dispatcher).
**Design rules:** zero-inference (no LLM in the view path); fail-soft; no-creds-in-source.
**Scope boundary:** IN — dispatcher + verb routing for the existing 4 + a documented pattern to add verbs. OUT — readfeed (T-uu-readfeed); retiring the view skills (T-skills-views-retire-to-cli).
**Test plan:** `uu mytickets` and `uu opentickets` output matches today's uumytickets/uuopentickets with NO CC invocation; `uu` (no args) lists verbs; `uu bogus` prints help + exits nonzero.
**Completion criteria:** `uu mytickets` runs from a bare shell (no claude process), output equals uumytickets; `command -v uu` resolves to the repo dispatcher; help lists >=4 verbs.

## Akien 2026-06-24 — add `uu help`
`uu help` is a verb ON this dispatcher (lists all uu verbs — the CLI-side mirror of /workflow). Coherence of the two help surfaces tracked on T-workflow-index-and-uu-help (gated on this).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)

[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Built bin/uu — zero-inference uu <verb> dispatcher. First-token dispatch + shift + "$@" passthrough (the convention the Phase-B chain inherits: uu device <dev> <verb> and uu readfeed <device> [channel] become one case each). Verbs: mytickets/opentickets read the CANONICAL filesystem ticket store via unseen_university.ticket_store + ticket_status (single taxonomy source) — NOT the Postgres DB (Akien: DB is no longer source of truth for tickets/decisions/any build artifact) and NOT cc_queue.py list (hides tickets); recall/research route to existing librarian scripts; help/no-verb lists verbs (exit 0); unknown verb -> help + nonzero. bin/ added to PATH via versioned uu_bash_profile_processor.sh (idempotent); command -v uu verified resolving to repo dispatcher in a fresh sourced shell. DEVIATION from ticket wording ('routing targets, unchanged'): mytickets/opentickets were NOT ported from the DB-querying ~/bin scripts (obsolete clan.memories query); new uu_tickets.py reads the fs store — the 'output equals uumytickets' criterion is superseded by the DB-not-source-of-truth correction. Akien must re-source his profile (or open a new shell) for uu to appear on PATH; ~/bin uu* retirement left to Akien (no collision — uu itself isn't in ~/bin). Proof: tests/test_uu_dispatcher.py (hermetic dispatch contract, red->green @ 088e5384).
